en_to_zh-TW.f215f954bac9dbb0cd7cb0fcb7ec28ec:
# EventAlertMod 正式服重寫：AI 上下文

## 專案概要

EventAlertMod (EAM) 是一個用於輕量級光環的魔獸世界插件，
冷卻時間和物品冷卻警報。它的身份很簡單：顯示重要
法術和物品狀態為可讀圖標，而不會成為 WeakAuras 克隆。

此重寫僅針對魔獸世界正式服版，正式服版 12.x /
午夜時代的 API 是預期的世代。現有經典、熊貓人之謎經典服、
Cata Classic、Wrath Classic、TBC、Era 和特定地區的 Classic 分店是
僅行為歷史，不得塑造新架構。

## 重寫方向

目前的源代碼樹保留了多年的行為，但混合了相容性
分支、UI建置、光環掃描、冷卻邏輯、物品快取產生、
特殊資源、斜線指令、全域變數、本地化和框架佈局
en_to_zh-TW.dcbfd6a02428d6a022aa814b4318229b:
相同的運行時表面。重寫應保留有用的資料並面向用戶
語義，同時用顯式模組取代內部結構。

所需的目標模組：

- `核心/Env.lua`
- `核心/Util.lua`
- `核心/常數.lua`
- `核心/EventRouter.lua`
- `核心/調度程序.lua`
- `Core/SavedVariables.lua`
- `核心/性能.lua`
- `服務/AuraService.lua`
- `服務/CooldownService.lua`
- `服務/ItemCooldownService.lua`
- `服務/SpellInfoService.lua`
- `UI/IconPool.lua`
- `UI/Renderer.lua`
- `UI/Options.lua`
- `UI/Slash.lua`
- `調試/調試狀態.lua`
- `調試/PromptExport.lua`

## 不可協商的界限

- 沒有秘密值可以繞過。
- 沒有受保護的資料繞過。
- 沒有戰鬥自動化。
- 沒有外部依賴。
- 沒有複雜的使用者腳本引擎。
- 無需頻繁的持續掃描。
- 沒有每個圖示計時器、每個法術計時器或每個專案計時器架構。

## 簡單原則
en_to_zh-TW.8eebadef613821912a96f36a9ab1ae96:
EAM 對於一般使用者來說應該保持簡單：新增法術 ID、啟用警報，請參閱
圖標，調整一小組顯示選項，並匯出緊湊的調試狀態
僅按需提供。

## 現有討論主播

之前的 ChatGPT 討論上下文位於：

- `DevDocument/ChatGPT/EventAlertMod_ChatGPT_Discussion_Context.md`

該文件中的重要歷史要點：

- EAM 不基於 Ace3。
- 目前目錄使用 `RequiredDeps: !Lib_ZYF`，但重寫目標並不是新的
  外部依賴。
- `/eam opt` 是記錄的設定指令。
- 現有行為包括自身光環、目標光環、法術冷卻時間、物品
  冷卻時間、工具提示法術/物品 ID、本地化和可選的調試助手。
- 較早的工作已經觸及“Main/EventAlert_EAFun.lua”作為相容性
  門面。未來的代理人一定不能假設文件是最終的架構。

## 首次通過審核結果
en_to_zh-TW.a4788f56c8605e6e646c1fd881730b01:
`Docs/01_ARCHITECTURE.md` 包含目前檔案對映和模組
責任。 `Docs/03_STATE_SCHEMA.md` 包含 SavedVariables 和全域變量
國家錨。 `Docs/05_PERFORMANCE_GUIDE.md` 包含候選熱路徑，
OnUpdate/C_Timer的使用和分配風險。 `文件/07_MIGRATION_NOTES.md`
包含行為遷移註釋。

# 架構

## 目前文件映射

根：

- `EventAlertMod_Mainline.toc`：正式服/主線目錄，目前接口
  `120000`，版本`TWW_11.2.5_20251111`。
- `EventAlertMod_Cata.toc`, `EventAlertMod_Mists.toc`,
  `EventAlertMod_TBC.toc`、`EventAlertMod_Wrath.toc`：不支援的舊版 TOC。
- `embeds.xml`：載入捆綁的庫。
- `README.md`、`changelog.txt`：歷史行為和命令上下文。
- `libs/`：捆綁`LibCustomGlow-1.0`、`LibDebug`、`LibStub`。
- `locale/`: `localization.comm.lua`, `.en.lua`, `.tw.lua`, `.cn.lua`,
  `.kr.lua`、`.ru.lua`。
- `圖像/`、`音樂/`：媒體資產。
- `DevDocument/`：參考 URL 和先前的 ChatGPT 上下文。
- `Classic/`、`TBC/`、`Wrath/`：不支援的遺留來源根。
- `Main/`：目前主線實作。

目前主線負載錨：
en_to_zh-TW.293dfc0ee625379fce2701102b374673:
- `Main/EventAlertMod.xml`：載入 Mainline Lua 模組並建立
  `EA_Main_Frame` / `EA_Version_Frame`。
- XML 選項面板：
  - `主/EventAlert_Options.xml`
  - `主/EventAlert_IconOptions.xml`
  - `主/EventAlert_ClassAlerts.xml`
  - `主/EventAlert_OtherAlerts.xml`
  - `主/EventAlert_TargetAlerts.xml`
  - `主/EventAlert_SCDAlerts.xml`
  - `主/EventAlert_GroupAlerts.xml`

目前主線 Lua 模組：

- `EventAlert_LoadDefault.lua`：預設的`EA_Config2`值。
- `EventAlert_InitVar.lua`：初始化`EA_Config`、`EA_Position`、命名空間
  運行時表、調試標誌、類別/規範全域變數。
- `EventAlert_InitVar_DK.lua`：死亡騎士符文常數/紋理。
- `EventAlert_SpellItem.lua`：大型法術/物品資料表。
- `EventAlert_CreateFrames.lua`：建立圖示、錨點、滾動清單、
  小地圖按鈕、群組框架和特殊資源框架。
en_to_zh-TW.fbf3e9c875f1b6eabdc786ba7bf230ca:
- `EventAlert_SpellArray.lua`：類別/預設法術陣列和資料載入。
- `EventAlert_Animation.lua`：視覺動畫/背景助手。
- `EventAlert_Util.lua`：列印助手、工具提示助手、光環查找、
  增益清單突變、發光助手、法術/天賦檢查。
- `EventAlert_EAFun.lua`：滾動/調試、遷移的兼容性外觀，
  工具提示、條件、計時器文字、群組結果、佈局和提示綁定。
- `EventAlert_SlashCommand.lua`：`/eam` 指令處理。
- `EventAlert_GroupEvent.lua`：使用者定義的條件/群組警報檢查。
- `EventAlert_Core.lua`：插件加載，事件註冊/調度，大多數
  頂級事件處理程序、查找、版本檢查、更新循環。
- `EventAlert_ItemSpellCache.lua`：項目到法術快取建構器和大型項目
  掃描。
- `EventAlert_Aura_Core.lua`：完整/增量光環快取助手。
en_to_zh-TW.c00cd54e172b0cdf4849cf0598e4d0dc:
- `EventAlert_Aura_Self.lua`：玩家/寵物光環警報和自我圖示佈局。
- `EventAlert_Aura_Target.lua`：目標光環警報和目標圖示佈局。
- `EventAlert_Cooldown.lua`：法術/物品冷卻警報和 SCD 佈局。
- `EventAlert_SpecialPower.lua`：符文、組合點、類別資源、
  生命綻放、活力和其他特殊力量框架。
- `EventAlert_API.lua`：API 別名層，目前不在 XML 載入清單中。
- `EventAlert_Options.lua`：選項 UI 邏輯和群組事件編輯器。
- `EventAlert_IconOptions.lua`：圖示選項 UI、錨點移動、字型/位置
  設定。
- `EventAlert_ImportExport.lua`：匯入/匯出原型，目前已註釋
  以 XML 形式輸出。

## 目前 XML/UI 範本使用情況

靜態 XML 面板使用這些範本系列：

- `UIPanelButtonTemplate`
- `UICheckButtonTemplate`
- `選項滑桿模板`
- `UIDropDownMenuTemplate`
en_to_zh-TW.6157d6ae0d345031441f375761b1b40c:
- `UIPanelScrollFrameTemplate`
- `輸入框模板`
- `背景模板`
- `遊戲字體正常`
- `遊戲字體突出顯示`
- `EA_SpellEditTextTemplate`

動態Lua框架建立使用：

- `CreateFrame("Frame", ...)` 用於警報圖示、錨點、清單容器、群組
  框架和小地圖按鈕。
- `CreateFrame("Cooldown", ..., "CooldownFrameTemplate")` 用於冷卻滑動
  幀。
- `CreateFrame("ScrollFrame", ..., "UIPanelScrollFrameTemplate")` 用來法術
  列表和導入/導出面板。
- `CreateFrame("EditBox", ..., "InputBoxTemplate")` 和 XML 編輯框
  法術 ID 和匯入/匯出文字的範本。
- `CreateFrame("Button", ..., "UIPanelButtonTemplate")` 和 XML 選項
  按鈕。
- `CreateFontString(..., "GameFontNormal")` 和相關遊戲字體。
- 透過 `Lib_ZYF:SetBackdrop` 和直接 `BackdropTemplate` 呼叫背景
en_to_zh-TW.a5a4f23d7545a624c158945fe7cd67fa:
在原型導入/導出程式碼中的用法。

重寫規則：UI 範本屬於 `UI/IconPool`、`UI/Renderer` 和
`使用者介面/選項`。服務不得直接創建框架或改變框架佈局。

## 目前的職責

目前的程式碼職責是混合的：

- `Core.lua` 擁有載入順序、事件註冊、事件路由、功能
  處理程序、尋找掃描、版本檢查和回退更新計畫。
- Aura 服務分為“Aura_Core”、“Aura_Self”和“Aura_Target”，
  但仍然直接渲染和調度。
- 冷卻服務執行法術冷卻查詢、物品冷卻查詢、
  渲染幀突變，以及一個模組中的延遲更新。
- 幀建立和渲染器行為分佈在「CreateFrames」中，
  `EAFun`、`Aura_*`、`Cooldown`、`SpecialPower` 和選項模組。
en_to_zh-TW.12ef779a3bf83358069f994dd81135a9:
- SavedVariables直接在全域表中初始化，無需模式
  版本控製或驗證邊界。
- 本地化使用全域字串常數並混合到 UI 設定中。

## 目標模組映射

核心：

- `Env`：外掛程式命名空間、本地 API 別名、構建/風味保護、僅限正式服
  守衛。
- `Util`：分配助手、池、後備表 API、枚舉助手、
  斷言。
- `常數`：凍結枚舉、事件名稱、狀態代碼、模式版本。
- `EventRouter`：一幀，一個`OnEvent`，事件到模組的調度表。
-`Scheduler`：一個`OnUpdate`，到期隊列，低頻回退，無
  每個圖示計時器。
- `SavedVariables`：預設值、遷移、驗證、版本化模式。
- `性能`：FPS/戰鬥節流、可選分析、共享池。

服務：

- `AuraService`：安全玩家/目標光環適配器和快取所有者。
en_to_zh-TW.660a5356ac1d38bcaf8f9a7c7ab2e07f:
- `CooldownService`：法術冷卻適配器和標準化冷卻狀態。
- `ItemCooldownService`：物品冷卻適配器和可選的增量快取。
- `SpellInfoService`：法術名稱/圖示/連結快取。
- `ClassPowerService`：玩家等級特殊力量（神聖力量、碎片、連擊點數、真氣、奧術充能）適配器和中央堆疊編號。
- `GroundEffectService`：地面效應法術監視器 (SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS) 具有雙重持續時間（動態工具提示抓取與手動輸入）計時器追蹤。
- `TotemService`：薩滿圖騰插槽使用 C_Totems.GetTotemInfo 進行監控。

使用者介面：

- `IconPool`：匯集按鈕、紋理、冷卻區域和 FontStrings。
- `Renderer`：僅消耗標準化渲染狀態；沒有資料取得。
- `選項`：簡單的配置面板。
- `Slash`：`/eam` 指令解析器和偵錯匯出指令。

偵錯:
en_to_zh-TW.c3a395d0f2bd9b1026f7e3c932b37538:
- `DebugState`：緊湊的運行時快照分為事實、派生狀態、
  人類筆記、邊界警告和環境。
- `PromptExport`：按需緊湊的類似 JSON 的輸出。

## 資料流

1. 暴雪事件進入`EventRouter`。
2. 路由器向一項或多項服務進行調度。
3. 服務讀取安全的 Retail API 並更新擁有的執行時間狀態。
4. 服務發出或標記髒「AlertState」記錄。
5. `Renderer` 接收髒警報狀態並更新池圖示。
6.「調度程序」僅處理到期刷新、回退採樣和調試突發。
7. SavedVariables 在載入時讀取/遷移，並且僅透過配置變更寫入。

## 事件流程

主要活動應僅包括必要的正式服活動，例如：

- `玩家登入`
- `玩家進入世界`
- `PLAYER_REGEN_ENABLED`
- `PLAYER_REGEN_DISABLED`
- `PLAYER_TARGET_CHANGED`
- `UNIT_AURA`
- `SPELL_UPDATE_COOLDOWN`
en_to_zh-TW.8fcae70edac46048b01552d6e1681801:
- `SPELL_UPDATE_CHARGES`
- `BAG_UPDATE_COOLDOWN`
- `UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED`
- 僅當啟用特殊資源 UI 時才發生電源/資源事件

沒有「RegisterAllEvents」。

## UI 渲染流程

渲染器輸入是“IconRenderState”，而不是原始光環/冷卻 API 資料。渲染器：

- 從「IconPool」取得圖示；
- 僅寫入更改後的紋理、堆疊、計時器、名稱、冷卻時間、發光和 alpha；
- 批次更改佈局並隱藏父級，然後顯示一次；
- 避免`ClearAllPoints`和`SetPoint`除非佈局鍵改變；
- 從不查詢 C_* API。

## 排程程式流程

一個調度程序框架按數字時間追蹤到期作業。工作是可重複使用的記錄，
不封配置點。後備輪詢必須是低頻的並且
在戰鬥/低 FPS 中停用或節流，除非它可以保護正確性。

## 僅限正式服重寫計劃
en_to_zh-TW.540811d310891f5722191166c86b5d79:
1.在`Core/`、`Services/`下引入新的模組骨架和載入順序，
   “UI/”和“調試/”。
2. 在建立新表時僅保留舊的“Main/”表作為遷移/參考
   架構。
3. 將 SavedVariables 遷移到版本化設定檔和警報列表模型。
4. 將本地化字串移植到獨立的本地化模組中。
5. 在移植服務之前實作`EventRouter`和`Scheduler`。
6.移植玩家光環、目標光環、法術冷卻、物品冷卻服務。
7. 實作池化渲染器並將影格建立移出服務模組。
8. 針對新服務重建斜線指令並除錯導出器。
9. 從活動負載中移除舊版 TOC 和 Classic/MOP 相容性分支。
10. 執行靜態檢查，然後進行即時正式服驗證。

## 警報狀態
en_to_zh-TW.a221ff642f545ddd464a5534d92ad679:
# 模組合約

## 所有權規則

- `SavedVariables` 擁有持久配置表和遷移。
- 服務擁有運行時事實。
- `Renderer` 擁有渲染的 UI 狀態。
- `IconPool` 擁有框架物件。
- `Scheduler` 擁有應有的工作。
- `DebugState` 擁有偵錯/會話快照。
- 靜態常數可能會被凍結。運行時狀態和 SavedVariables 絕不能
  被凍結。
- 每個主動載入的來源檔案必須以模組註解區塊開頭
  記錄目的、設計理念、所有權、突變邊界，以及
  保養注意事項。當模組合約發生變化時，請保持此評論最新。
  請參閱“Docs/12_CODE_COMMENTARY_GUIDE.md”。

## 核心/環境

輸入：

- 外掛名稱和命名空間
- 正式服構建/風味 API

輸出：

- 外掛程式命名空間
- 本機API別名表
- 僅限正式服的防護結果

突變：

- 可以初始化外掛名稱空間一次
en_to_zh-TW.4ab239f1434aa8736ea9b3f0ee3c6d31:
- 不得更改 SavedVariables

## 核心/實用程式

輸入：

- 原始 Lua/WoW 表 API

輸出：

- `CreateTable`、`FreezeTable`、`IsFrozen`、池助手、安全擦除/釋放、
  穩定的枚舉助手，調試斷言
- 秘密/受保護值安全讀取助手：
  - `readSafeField`
  - `readSafeScalar`
  - `標記邊界`
  - `appendBoundaryWarning`
  - `清除定時器`

突變：

- 僅擁有輔助本地池

## 核心/常數

輸入：

- 模組載入後無

輸出：

- 凍結枚舉表、模組名稱、事件名稱、狀態常數、模式
  版本、哨兵常數，例如“UNKNOWN”和“EMPTY”

突變：

- 凍結後沒有

## 核心/事件路由器

輸入：

- 模組事件訂閱
- 暴雪事件

輸出：

# 效能指南

## 熱路徑候選者

目前主線熱路徑候選人：

- `主/EventAlert_Core.lua`
  - 事件調度和處理程序
  - `COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED`
  - `UNIT_AURA`
  - `BAG_UPDATE_COOLDOWN`
  - `SPELL_UPDATE_COOLDOWN`
  - `SPELL_UPDATE_CHARGES`
  - `SPELL_UPDATE_USABLE`
  - `ACTIONBAR_UPDATE_COOLDOWN`
  - 使用計時器/協程進行查找掃描
- `主/EventAlert_Aura_Self.lua`
  - `Buffs_Update`
  - `更新時`
  - `位置框架`
- `主/EventAlert_Aura_Target.lua`
  - `TarBuffs_Update`
  - `OnTarUpdate`
  - `TarPositionFrames`
- `主/EventAlert_Cooldown.lua`
  - `OnSCDUpdate`
  - `ScdBuffs_Update`
  - `更新ScdFrame`
  - `ScdPositionFrames`
- `主/EventAlert_ItemSpellCache.lua`
  - 物品範圍掃描建構器
- `主/EventAlert_SpecialPower.lua`
  - 資源/力量更新
  - 符文 OnUpdate 腳本
en_to_zh-TW.b304a0cb94e4d8cd28e1d09750e9be8d:
- `主/EventAlert_CreateFrames.lua`
  - 框架創建和滾動列表生成
- `主/EventAlert_EAFun.lua`
  - 版面配置、工具提示、計時器文字、偵錯標籤助手

## 目前 OnUpdate / C_Timer 使用情況

觀察到的主線使用情況：

- `EventAlert_Core.lua`
  - 遞歸`C_Timer.After(tempInterval, RecurringFrameUpdate)`
  - FPS 調整節奏用於位置/特殊幀更新
  - `C_Timer.NewTicker(1 / GetFramerate(), function() ...)` 用來尋找
- `EventAlert_Aura_Self.lua`
  - `G:OnUpdate(spellId)` 用於光環計時器刷新
  - 在先前指派 `tempFunc = function() G.OnUpdate(spellId) end`
    `C_Timer.After（延遲，tempFunc）`
- `EventAlert_Aura_Target.lua`
  - `C_Timer.After（延遲，G.OnTarUpdate，G，spellId）`
- `EventAlert_Cooldown.lua`
  - `C_Timer.After(nextInterval, G.OnSCDUpdate, G, sid)`
- `EventAlert_ItemSpellCache.lua`
en_to_zh-TW.7e5b0be402a7d2cfc0362eeb7c0f2fdb:
- `C_Timer.NewTicker(0.01, function() ...)`
  - `C_Timer.After(1, ProcessBatch)` 用於批次掃描繼續
- `EventAlert_SpecialPower.lua`
  - 每個符文 `SetScript("OnUpdate", function(self, elapsedTime) ...)`
  - `C_Timer.After` 用於生命綻放刷新
- `EventAlert_Util.lua`
  - `Lib_ZYF:StopOnUpdate(eaf)` 在幀清理中調用

重寫規則：

- 用一個中央調度程式取代它們。
- 調度程式回調記錄應可重複使用，並由警報/服務 ID 鍵入。
- 重複刷新路徑中沒有每個圖示計時器和閉包分配。

## 分配政策

使用 `table.create` 用於：

- 配置警報陣列
- 活動狀態數組
- 骯髒的隊列
- 圖示池記錄
- 排程程式作業記錄
- 調試環形緩衝區
- 預設設定檔模板

避免在熱路徑中：

- 每個光環的瞬態表
en_to_zh-TW.940b62c4d26072bd6ce649b720c84125:
- 當直接數字索引分配就足夠時`table.insert`
- `pairs`/`ipairs` 其中確定性數字循環可用
- 臨時字串構建
- 匿名回呼函數

## 表.freeze 策略

僅凍結：

- 常數
- 列舉
- 狀態名稱
- 模式描述
- 不可變的預設欄位設定文件
- 靜態模組合約

切勿凍結：

- 保存的變數
- 運轉時間環/冷卻狀態
- 圖示渲染狀態
- UI框架記錄
- 調度程序佇列
- 池對象
- 調試快照

## UI 寫入策略

渲染器必須快取最後渲染的值並跳過無操作寫入：

- `設定文字`
- `設定紋理`
- `設定阿爾法`
- `設定冷卻時間`
- `設定點`
- `設定大小`
- “顯示”/“隱藏”

佈局應該是批量的：

1. 收集髒佈局鍵。
2. 隱藏父框架。
3. 僅套用更改的位置/尺寸。
4. 顯示一次父框架。
en_to_zh-TW.584d5d3e45633f768e8a9da5c74949f0:
## 戰鬥/低 FPS 節流

在以下情況下，繁重的工作必須被阻止、延遲或降級：

- `InCombatLockdown()` 為 true；
- FPS 低於配置的閾值；
- 工作需要大掃描；
- 達到受保護/秘密邊界。

允許的降級行為：

- 僅顯示安全圖示/名稱；
- 將計時器標記為「未知」、「受保護」或「僅顯示」；
- 跳過可選項目快取進程；
- 安排非戰鬥刷新。

## 目前配置風險

首次透過審核發現了這些可能的來源：

- 重複光環掃描循環超過 1..40 個有用且有害的指數；
- `AuraUtil.ForEachAura` 回呼使用；
- 工具提示呼叫後掛鉤和工具提示解析路徑；
- aura 更新中的 `C_Timer.After(function() ...)` 閉包分配；
- 冷卻更新後備中的動態影格建立；
- 具有計時器回調的項目範圍掃描；
en_to_zh-TW.6aea10370e1a49976c47eb7c9fa25aef:
- 調試標籤和查找輸出中的字串格式；
- 全域意外變數導致生命週期和 GC 行為不明確。
en_to_zh-TW.eb3219341aa79fd40a018dc3ed50e9c7:
# 正式服測試計劃

此文件通行證未執行任何即時正式服驗證。

## 靜態檢查

- 確認僅正式服目錄處於活動狀態以進行重寫。
- 當針對 Retail 12.0.7 時，確認 TOC 介面為「120007」。
- 確認沒有載入 Classic/MOP/Cata/Wrath/TBC 來源根。
- 搜尋意外的全域變數。
- 搜尋「C_Timer.After（函數」。
- 搜尋每幀/每圖示 `SetScript("OnUpdate")`。
- 搜尋大型項目 ID 掃描循環。
- 搜尋應用於 SavedVariables 或運行時狀態的「table.freeze」。
- 搜尋舊版「UnitAura」解包路徑。
- 搜尋舊的全域「GetSpellCooldown」解包假設。
- 在秘密檢查之前搜尋不安全光環「spellID」比較。
- 搜尋用作事實的 Cooldown 小部件 getter 讀回。
- 搜尋戰鬥中框架創建或佈局突變。

## 登入/重新載入UI
en_to_zh-TW.b57417abb1bc16b17fd8087480b679ce:
- 在 Retail 12.x 中載入插件。
- 確認登入時沒有 Lua 錯誤。
- 確認 SavedVariables 遷移一次並保持可寫入。
- 確認“/reload”保留設定檔和位置。
- 確認已停用的警報保持停用狀態。

## 斜線指令

- `/eam opt` 開啟選項。
- 在框架存在之前在戰鬥中調用的“/eam opt”不應創建受保護的操作或污點錯誤。
- `/eam help` 列印指令摘要。
- `/eam add <spellID>` 新增玩家光環警報。
- `/eam add target <spellID>` 新增目標光環警報。
- `/eam add cd <spellID>` 新增法術冷卻警報。
- `/eam add item <itemID>` 新增項目冷卻警報。
- `/eam remove <spellID>` 刪除玩家光環警報。
- `/eam remove target <spellID>` 刪除目標光環警報。
- `/eam remove cd <spellID>` 刪除法術冷卻時間警報。
en_to_zh-TW.b3ee375319c3251d3857e9a20299f8fd:
- `/eam remove item <itemID>` 刪除項目冷卻警報。
- `/eam export` 列印緊湊的提示/調試導出。
-`/eam show`切換自我光環spellID偵測。
-`/eam showt`切換目標光環spellID偵測。
- `/eam showc` 切換施放法術 ID 偵測。
- `/eam showa` 是選擇加入的並且顯然是可以阻止的。
- `/eam MiniMap` 切換小地圖選項按鈕。
- `/eam MiniMap Reset` 重設小地圖位置。
- `/eam SCDRemoveWhenCooldown`
- `/eam SCDNocombatStillKeep`
- `/eam SCDGlowWhenUsable`
- `/eam IconAppenSpellTip`
- `/eam ShowRunesBar`
- 用於名稱/計時器/堆疊文字的字體大小命令。
- 新的調試導出命令僅根據需要產生緊湊的輸出。

## 選項 UI 測試

- 使用「/eam opt」開啟脫離戰鬥的選項面板。
- 確認數字 ID 編輯框僅接受數字。
en_to_zh-TW.7ffe67b330eb89088f76c52ce6ffcea9:

- 確認每個成功的按鈕操作都會增加 SavedVariables 修訂版並刷新匹配的服務。
- 確認無效或空 ID 顯示簡短的狀態訊息，而不會引發 Lua 錯誤。
- 確認關閉並重新開啟面板不會重複重新建立小工具。
- 在創建面板之前在戰鬥中打開“/eam opt”，並確認 EAM 列印延遲訊息而不是建構幀。
- 在面板已經存在後，在戰鬥中開啟“/eam opt”，並確認顯示/隱藏不會污染安全的 UI 路徑。

## 玩家光環測試

- 透過spellID新增玩家增益並出現確認圖示。
- 透過「/eam add <spellID>」、「/reload」新增玩家增益，並確認其持續存在。
- 透過「/eam remove <spellID>」刪除該增益並確認圖示隱藏。

- 確認計時器文字僅在安全時出現。
- 當持續時間/到期時間不可用時，確認圖示保持穩定。
- 確認玩家/寵物匹配的行為符合配置。
- 確認空閒時沒有高頻全掃描。
- 確認`UNIT_AURA`增量更新過程`addedAuras`、`updatedAuraInstanceIDs`和`removedAuraInstanceIDs`。
- 當「updateInfo」為零或標記為完整更新時，確認完整更新回退仍然有效。
- 確認完整更新回退會針對每個相關過濾器掃描一次設備，並且不會針對每個配置的警報掃描一次。
- 確認完整掃描中未配置的光環警報被標記為非活動狀態。

## 目標光環測試

- 透過「/eam add target <spellID>」和「/eam remove target <spellID>」新增/刪除目標光環。

- 確認靜態表上的「table.freeze」/「table.isfrozen」行為，並驗證沒有 SavedVariables/運行時狀態被凍結。

# AI提示匯出架構

## 目的

僅按需進行調試導出。它的存在是為了幫助用戶或人工智慧代理進行檢查
EAM 狀態，無需轉儲大量日誌。

模式：

- `debug-min`：緊湊狀態以提供快速支援。
- `analysis-full`：用於架構/調試分析的詳細但有限的狀態。
- `github-issue`：使用者可讀的問題負載。

## 需要分離

導出必須分開：

- 事實：直接、安全的API資料；
- 派生：計算出的 UI/渲染狀態；
- 人工註釋：使用者可讀的註釋；
- 邊界警告：秘密/受保護/不安全資料限制；
- 環境：建置、區域設定、戰鬥狀態、FPS、外掛程式版本。

不要將猜測值與事實混為一談。

## 緊湊模式
en_to_zh-TW.73f1d663dd12808030e1745714a91126:

- 沒有自動導出。
- 沒有無限制的光環列表。
- 預設沒有完整的 SavedVariables 轉儲。
- 沒有戰鬥日誌垃圾郵件。
- 沒有大型專案快取轉儲。
- 字串建置僅在明確匯出命令期間發生。

# 已知限制

## 即時驗證差距

這次審計是靜態的。沒有可用的 WoW Retail 12.x 用戶端，因此 API 名稱，
傳回形狀、秘密/受保護的行為和 XML 運行時行為仍然需要
遊戲內驗證。

## 秘密/受保護的值

正式服可能會返回秘密、受保護、僅供顯示或不可用的光環數據
和冷卻狀態。重寫必須安全降級：

- 僅圖示顯示；
- 僅已知安全的名稱/圖示/堆疊；
- 計時器模式「受保護」、「僅顯示」或「未知」；
- 沒有捏造的持續時間/到期時間/冷卻時間事實；
- 僅當請求調試/導出時調試邊界警告。

## 戰鬥限制

某些 UI 或資料更新可能不安全或在戰鬥中不可用。繁重的工作，
快取建置、佈局重建和類似遷移的操作必須延遲
或節流。

## 不支援的分支

重寫不支援：
en_to_zh-TW.1878690fc2770db7fad9dd571b45deb4:
- 經典
- 熊貓人之謎經典服
- 浩劫與重生經典服賽
- 巫妖王之怒經典服
- 燃燒的遠征經典服
- 時代
- 特定於區域的經典相容性分支

舊目錄可能保留在儲存庫中，僅供參考。

## 目前來源風險

首次透過審核發現以下風險：

- 主線中混合正式服和遺留相容性分支；
- 遺留的 TOC 仍然存在於根部；
- 目前目錄和許多運行時模組所需的“Lib_ZYF”；
- 大型法術/物品資料表；
- `EventAlert_ItemSpellCache.lua` 中的項目範圍掃描；
- 遞歸計時器調度和每個資源的 OnUpdate 腳本；
- 廣泛的全域變數使用和意外全域變數；
- 工具提示和 aura API 假設可能與受保護的資料衝突；
- 「Main/」下的重複/存檔檔案名稱有亂碼，且
  `DevDocument/ChatGPT/`;
- `EventAlert_ImportExport.lua` 具有原型全域變量，並被註解掉
  載入順序。

# Retail API Boundary

## Retail 12.x Assumptions

This rewrite targets the Retail 12.x/Midnight-era API. All API notes in this document are considered hypothetical unless they have been loaded and tested in WoW Retail.

Prefer namespaces:

- `C_AddOns`
- `C_Spell`
- `C_Item`
- `C_UnitAuras`
- `C_TooltipInfo`
- `AuraUtil`
- `C_Timer` only through the central scheduler or explicit non-hot setup

The legacy unpacked return compatibility layer is not retained unless there is an explicit, narrow, and documented Retail-safe fallback.

## Taint Control Policy
zh-TW_to_en.be3826ef5f164e0ed56ae9acfad24351:
The secure execution / taint document of Warcraft Wiki points out that AddOn and `/script` are untrusted sources; once taint enters the protected/secure path, Blizzard UI actions may be blocked during combat. EAM must treat avoiding taint pollution as an architectural boundary, not just as a bug fix.

Implementation rules:

- Do not hook, override, redefine or monkey patch Blizzard secure/protected functions, FrameXML core functions, action button, unit frame, nameplate, spell cast, targeting, item use related paths.
zh-TW_to_en.cb803db7dedd44a4c0ecbb7888683ae0:
- Do not modify the protected frame's attribute, parent, anchor, size, visibility, template or click behavior in combat.
- Do not pass secret/protected value, runtime cache, debug object or addon callback into the Blizzard frame that may pollute the secure chain.
- EventRouter uses orphan frames; Renderer frames are only for display and do not assume secure action or protected interaction.
- When UIParent frame is required, limit it to unprotected display purposes; if `InCombatLockdown()` is true, defer structural UI changes.
zh-TW_to_en.6526f3bc8db6420ca5c7c5637c17d716:
- No use of `forceinsecure`, no attempt to bypass taint, and no workaround to suppress Blizzard blocked action.
- When taint, blocked action, and combat lockdown errors are found, they need to be logged to `Docs/15_DEVELOPMENT_ISSUE_LOG.md`.

## Current Aura API Usage Audit

Current Mainline references:

- `C_UnitAuras.GetBuffDataByIndex`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetDebuffDataByIndex`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDataByIndex`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDataByAuraInstanceID`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDuration`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraBaseDuration`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetRefreshExtendedDuration`
- `C_UnitAuras.GetUnitAuraInstanceIDs`
- `C_UnitAuras.AddBlockedAura` / `C_UnitAuras.ClearBlockedAuras`
- `C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitBuffByAuraInstanceID`
- `C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitDebuffByAuraInstanceID`
- `AuraUtil.ForEachAura`
- `AuraUtil.FindAuraByName`
zh-TW_to_en.9ff761288709643938294ca23a4c5f90:
- `GameTooltip:SetUnitAura`
- legacy `UnitAura` / `select(10, UnitAura(...))` fallback paths

Rewrite rule:

- Aura facts must come from safe structured Retail aura data, anchored by the stable, `NeverSecret` `AuraInstanceID`.
- **Blocked Aura Integration**: For unwanted or spammy auras, utilize the native `C_UnitAuras.AddBlockedAura(unit, auraInstanceID)` to delegate filtration to the C++ engine. This must only be called when the addon's execution path is completely untainted (`AllowedWhenUntainted`).
- **Native Dual-Pipeline Duration**: Prefer retrieving the C++ blackbox `DurationObject` via `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDuration` and feeding it directly to native widgets (`CooldownFrame:SetCooldownFromDurationObject` and `C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding`).
zh-TW_to_en.83d9055048ddee1b95c18ecf5fcfd601:
- **Pandemic Prediction**: DoT refresh checks must compare `C_UnitAuras.GetRefreshExtendedDuration(unit, auraInstanceID)` against `GetAuraBaseDuration * 1.3` in combat to bypass restricted numeric `timeLeft` checks.
- If a value is secret/protected/display-only, mark `boundaryLimited` and do not force it through normal Lua comparisons or table-key logic.
- Do not retain broad legacy UnitAura unpack mapping as architecture.

## Current Cooldown API Usage Audit

Current Mainline references:

- `C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown`
- `C_Spell.GetSpellBaseCooldown`
- `C_Spell.GetSpellCharges`
- `C_Spell.GetSpellInfo`
- `C_Spell.GetSpellTexture`
- `C_Spell.GetSpellLink`
- `C_Spell.IsSpellUsable`
- `C_Spell.DoesSpellExist`
- legacy global `GetSpellCooldown`, `GetSpellInfo`, `GetSpellTexture`,
  `GetSpellLink`, `GetSpellCharges`, `IsUsableSpell`
- `C_Secrets.ShouldSpellCooldownBeSecret`
zh-TW_to_en.f93ec51ec57ee932ab858961b9ed14a6:
- GCD spell ID `61304`

Rewrite rule:

- Prefer structured `C_Spell` returns.
- Treat cooldown facts as unavailable when secret/protected.
- Do not fabricate cooldown start, duration, or expiration.
- Avoid repeated cooldown queries every frame.

## Current Item Cooldown API Usage Audit

Current Mainline references:

- `C_Item.GetItemCooldown`
- `C_Item.GetItemSpell`
- `C_Item.DoesItemExistByID`
- `C_Container.GetItemCooldown` as a fallback in one alias layer
- legacy global `GetItemCooldown`, `GetItemSpell`
- `GetInventoryItemCooldown`
- `GetInventoryItemID`
- optional `HeroDBC.DBC.ItemSpell`
- large item range scanning in `EventAlert_ItemSpellCache.lua`

Rewrite rule:

- Support direct itemID cooldown monitoring first.
- Do not scan large item ranges in normal runtime.
- Any item-spell relation cache must be opt-in, idle-only, interruptible,
  FPS-aware, and combat-aware.
zh-TW_to_en.1f0cd4131e67547b1ae3830e75f8e6b0:
## Current Specialization & Localization API Audit

Current Mainline references:

- `GetSpecializationInfoForClassID`
- `GetClassInfo`
- `GetSpecializationInfo`

Rewrite rule:

- **Dynamic Localization**: Instead of hardcoding localized specialization or class names in the configuration UI, use native APIs to query matching strings dynamically aligned with the client's current language setting.
- **Spec Dropdown Filtering**: Map class tokens to class IDs (using static enum mappings such as `CLASS_TOKEN_TO_ID` matching WoW class IDs). Retrieve spec names dynamically via `GetSpecializationInfoForClassID(classID, specIndex)` (where `classID` is a number from 1 to 13 and `specIndex` is from 1 to 4).
zh-TW_to_en.308e7f40439376bd57cdfef7305f60ce:
- **Dual-Path Fallback**: Implement a solid fallback map when native localization APIs return `nil` or empty values, using static localized tables (`EAM.L`) to ensure UI components always have a readable name.

## Secret / Protected Value Policy

When data is unsafe or unavailable:

- **Four Safety Check APIs**:
  - `issecretvalue(value)`: Checks if a value is classified as a secret.
  - `canaccessvalue(value)`: Determines if the current context has rights to read a value.
  - `canaccesstable(table)`: Evaluates if a table's keys and values are readable.
  - `issecrettable(table)` / `hasanysecretvalues(table)`: Checks if the table structure is restricted or contains secrets.
- **Table Indexing Protection (Critical)**:
zh-TW_to_en.1a2d0c8b9677bcfb85859ac232e13122:
- AddOns must never index standard Lua tables using an unverified key that might be a `Secret Value` (e.g. `spellId` or `text` returned during combat restrictions).
  - Attempting to index a table with a secret key yields a fatal error: `attempted to index a table that cannot be indexed with secret keys`.
  - Always guard table lookups with `if not issecretvalue(key) and canaccesstable(tbl) then ... end`.
- **Data-Driven Tooltip & Secrecy Defense**:
  - Direct `C_TooltipInfo` queries (`GetUnitBuffByAuraInstanceID`) in combat return structured `TooltipData` which may be flagged as `Secret Table`.
  - When parsing static values from `line.leftText`, always defend against secret propagation using `if text and not issecretvalue(text) and canaccessvalue(text) then ... end`.
zh-TW_to_en.0fd479dc6d3a18c9af81ca41c9b3b10a:
- **No `TooltipUtil.SurfaceArgs`**: In 12.x / Midnight, tooltip tables are natively surfaced. The `TooltipUtil.SurfaceArgs` helper is **entirely removed**; attempting to call it will throw a fatal `nil value` Lua error.
- Continue rendering safe state such as icon/name if available.
- Use timer mode `protected`, `displayOnly`, or `unknown`.
- Add a boundary warning to debug state.
- Schedule an out-of-combat refresh only if it is safe.
- Never mix guessed values into facts.
- Never pass unsafe values into secure/protected UI chains.

## Intentionally Avoided APIs / Patterns

- Classic API branches.
- MOP/Cata/Wrath/TBC API return mappings.
- `RegisterAllEvents`.
- Tooltip scanning as a normal data source (use it only for low-frequency static duration scrape fallbacks).
- `TooltipUtil.SurfaceArgs` usage (always let the native engine surface the arguments).
zh-TW_to_en.3b0a91db8b05374ff1e5108be45dc150:
- Huge item ID scans during login/combat.
- Per-icon `SetScript("OnUpdate")`.
- Repeated `C_Timer.After(function() ...)` chains in hot paths.
- External framework dependencies for configuration.
- `forceinsecure` or any taint workaround to bypass or suppress blocked action.
zh-TW_to_en.9b66f2b09a344ef01e746c6101a2bb05:
# Warcraft Wiki 12.x API Change Notes

This document is compiled from the `API change summaries` and Retail 12.x of the Warcraft Wiki
Related pages, as implementation reference for EventAlertMod / EAM Retail rewrite.

This is not a full API file backup; this note only retains the files related to EAM's aura, cooldown,
item cooldown, UI renderer, debug export, SavedVariables migration directly
Relevant emphasis.

## Source

- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/API_change_summaries
- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Patch_12.0.0/API_changes
- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Patch_12.0.1/API_changes
- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Patch_12.0.5/API_changes
- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Patch_12.0.7/API_changes
- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Patch_12.0.5
zh-TW_to_en.f1923d39a2f04e417b0aa014c9531b76:
## 2026-05-26 Review Summary

After re-searching the Warcraft Wiki this time, the conclusions directly related to EAM are as follows:

- `API change summaries` and search indexes currently find `12.0.0`, `12.0.1`, `12.0.5`, `12.0.7` API change summaries.
- `Patch 12.0.0/API changes` is the core starting point for Secret Values ​​and AddOn security restrictions.
- `Patch 12.0.1/API changes` is a Midnight launch patch; the direct impact on EAM is lower than 12.0.0/12.0.5, but the new aura filter and tooltip/filter behaviors still need to be tracked.
zh-TW_to_en.21fcd0b93c0a21513d49b1e7777eb60f:
- `Patch 12.0.5/API changes` explicitly adds `table.freeze`, `table.isfrozen`, API Predicates files, Cooldown countdown formatter, FontString smooth scaling, and enhances Secret / security related error messages.
- 12.x introduces the powerful C language underlying Blocked Aura engine `C_UnitAuras.AddBlockedAura(unit, auraInstanceID)` and the time black box `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDuration(unit, auraInstanceID)`, providing 0-GC and 100% safe Taint-proof native execution chain.
zh-TW_to_en.2f2907446d3769decbe70ab8b5f704ed:
- 12.x introduces a data-driven Tooltip system, replacing the old `SetUnitBuff` simulated rendering with `C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitBuffByAuraInstanceID(unit, auraInstanceID)` and `GetUnitDebuffByAuraInstanceID`, completely separating the data from the UI, and perfectly bridging the `NeverSecret` `AuraInstanceID` location.
- `Secret_Values`, `ScriptObject_DurationObject`, `C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown`, `C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitBuffByAuraInstanceID` These single-page files are enough to support the architectural decision of EAM: the data source layer must handle the secret boundary, and the Renderer should try to leave it to the Blizzard widget to display the duration.
zh-TW_to_en.ce8b47da85ee7c886540adc64b7ab1ae:
- The public API change summary of 12.0.7 currently does not show large API changes that directly affect the core logic of EAM aura/cooldown/item cooldown, but adds `C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding`, `C_DurationUtil.CreateManualClock`, and removes `C_DurationUtil.GetCurrentTime`, which needs to be included in the DurationObject / timer display tracking item.

Note: The above is a cross-collation of files and search indexes, and has not been verified in the WoW Retail 12.x client.

## 2026-05-29 User-provided 12.0.7 PTR / RC review summary
zh-TW_to_en.e7bb559537be170eceb4fdfd20dd80bd:
The source of this section is the 12.0.7 PTR / RC changes posted by users. This round of public Internet searches has not yet found the corresponding page that can be directly quoted, so the following is first used as a working anchor "pending review by public sources and verification by WoW Retail/PTR actual machine"; it should not be regarded as a verified fact.

### 2026-05-29 PTR actual measurement update: DurationTextBinding

- User has executed `C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding` minimal test example in WoW 12.0.7 PTR client.
zh-TW_to_en.73909a4ec3266de454713bbd5f338d69:
- Result: FontString can display reciprocal text driven by `DurationTextBinding` normally.
- Verification scope: Only the minimum sample is confirmed to be displayed; it does not yet mean that the EAM Renderer has been integrated.
- Not yet verified: behavior in battle, taint log, text clearing after icon reuse, locale display, expired text, zero duration, integration strategy with the existing `Cooldown:SetCooldownFromDurationObject()`.
zh-TW_to_en.c4d2ade3363acaa5b7b709935acd8589:
- EAM implementation rules: `DurationTextBinding` can be considered as an available candidate path for 12.0.7 PTR, but feature detection and fallback are still required for formal integration.

### Directly related to EAM

- Tooltip money: Add `GameTooltip_AddMoneyLine`, use atlas / `MoneyFormatter` to display money instead; it is recommended that AddOn avoid the old `SetTooltipMoney` to reduce tooltip secret value problems.
zh-TW_to_en.4868fd3b214a9b89fb30015faa4ae363:
- Unit identity: Some APIs that restrict unit tokens, such as `UnitGUID`, `UnitAura`, and health/power APIs, will return `nil` or a default value when tokens are not supported, and Lua errors will no longer be thrown directly. EAM must still not rely on errors as a control flow.
- File asset: Added `C_UIFileAsset`, you can use `GetFileID`, `IsKnownFile`, `IsLooseFile` to verify whether the resource exists before using fonts and materials. EAM can be used at low frequency during Options/Renderer initialization and must not be placed on the hot path.
zh-TW_to_en.cb296d1e416c24520aa90d710cd3dbe6:
- Profiling: `GetEventCPUUsage`, `GetFunctionCPUUsage`, `GetScriptCPUUsage` re-opened to AddOn. EAM can only be used for on-demand debug/profiling and cannot enter normal runtime.
- Debug secret: `debugstack` and `debuglocals` may return secret values ​​if the current function or call stack has touched the secret value. EAM debug export must not directly output stack/local as safe text.
zh-TW_to_en.b2bc8285ef7f126f6d90289dc6afc2f8:
- ScrollBox secret: Officially fixed the problem caused when secret appears in scrollbox region. If EAM makes a setting list in the future, it still needs to avoid putting secret/protected raw values ​​into scrollable UI.
- Chat gain events: currency, honor, loot, money, reputation, XP gains chat events are no longer secret. EAM currently does not use chat events as the core data source, it is only included for subsequent debug/notification reference.
zh-TW_to_en.007868f291a23932cb01d6c5e6d5d0b7:
- TOC per-directive conditionals: TOC supports per-directive conditionals, such as `## Dep: Addon_X [AllowLoadGameType classic]`. EAM remains Retail-only and will not reintroduce the Classic branch for this capability.
- `SetFont`: clearer error message when invalid font flag is passed in. EAM Options should avoid allowing users to enter unvalidated flags.
zh-TW_to_en.6bc0ea6263ff4661c1e3398393bc710f:
- Duration text: Added `DurationTextBinding` script object, which can bind `DurationObject` directly to `FontString` and update the text by the native system. EAM timer label should give priority to evaluating this path in the future, instead of Lua OnUpdate counting down by itself.
- AuraData: `isFromPlayerOrPlayerPet` will be set to true on aura cast by player-controlled vehicle. EAM's "player or player pet source" judgment needs to include the vehicle scenario in the actual machine test.
zh-TW_to_en.2a622eb01bbb2eb118bf166c971f8f9d:
- Private aura sound: `C_UnitAuras.AddPrivateAuraAppliedSound` can be called during active M+ when not in combat. EAM does not include private aura sound into core functions for the time being.
- Aura refactor timeline: The official target is to put the aura exposure refactor in 12.1.0. EAM's AuraService should keep the adapter boundary clear and avoid hard-coding the 12.0.x aura table structure into the UI/Renderer.

### Low correlation with EAM but need to pay attention

- `ENCOUNTER_END` added boss `EncounterUnitStatus` list, including `creatureID`, `creatureName`, `remainingHealthPercent`, and marked as non-secret. EAM does not currently do an encounter boss timeline.
zh-TW_to_en.5a16e003febeb739281275a2d654bec6:
- `C_EncounterEvents` color API supports text warning, timeline event, 5 seconds remaining event and alpha value. EAM does not integrate encounter event timeline yet.
- SimulateMouse API no longer carries taint, but it can only be used when the current mouse focus is not forbidden, locked down, script inaccessible or protected frame, and is still limited to gamepad action. EAM should not incorporate this into the operating model.
- The second return value of `C_ScenarioInfo.GetUnitCriteriaProgressValues` is changed to `[0, 1]`. EAM does not use this API.
- Battle.net: `BNInviteFriend` migrated to `C_BattleNet.InviteFriend`. EAM is not used.
zh-TW_to_en.376b6b3e67e8b1fb9a9db62172cc0e9a:
- Mythic Plus run history / best APIs returns `CalendarTime` struct. EAM is not used.
- `GROUP_FORMED` Fixed event sending when follower dungeon / delve enters alone. EAM is not currently dependent.

### Classic PTR information processing principles
zh-TW_to_en.bb60628c3f4cd5026dd443391aa26c3d:
User-contributed content also includes upcoming Classic PTR builds, but this project is Retail-only. Classic's secret doc, raid target, macro chat, minimap ping and other changes are only used as the background of the "non-returnable EAM architecture" and do not enter the active code, TOC or module contract.

## Version positioning

- TOC for Retail 12.0.0 is `120000`.
- TOC for Retail 12.0.1 is `120001`.
- Retail PTR 12.0.5 shows Interface `120005` in `Public client builds`.
- The API change summary for Retail 12.0.7 indicates that the TOC is `120007`.
- EAM Retail rewrite should target the 12.x/Midnight-era API.

- Classic, MOP Classic, Cata Classic, Wrath Classic, TBC, Era should not enter the new architecture.

## 12.0.5 API change highlights

The API change page of 12.0.5 has the greatest impact on EAM: Lua formatter, DurationObject, aura field secrecy, `table.freeze`, and cooldown timer display API.

### API Predicates File

12.0.5 Added Predicates table to Lua API documentation to describe the restrictions of each API.

EAM implementation rules:

- Read the API predicates before implementation, not just the function name and return type.
zh-TW_to_en.662dcc56ab86df6b9fe423e08be504b9:
- If marked `SecretWhen...`, `AllowedWhenUntainted`, `SecretArguments`, `SecretReturnsForAspect`, the API must pass through the service layer or renderer isolation layer.
- Debug export should not output raw values ​​that are still unsafe after predicates are determined.
- When the document is not listed or the search index is incomplete, "safe" cannot be inferred; it can only be marked for verification.

### Lua Formatter and DurationObject

12.0.5 new Lua numeric formatter types:
zh-TW_to_en.0ee9319f2e9ef7b2c02818cf6863cf9d:
The documentation states that these formatters receive secret numbers via the duration object's `Format` functions and can be used by the cooldown frame.

New cooldown API:
zh-TW_to_en.6cc313b6807ceacdb74fc87c9e08104c:
EAM Renderer rules:

- timer text Don't spell the string in Lua hot path yourself.
- When there is `DurationObject`, give priority to `Cooldown` to use the formatter.
- Display of milliseconds/decimal seconds below the threshold is given to `SetCountdownMillisecondsThreshold`.
- The seconds literal formatter must be measured by Live Retail and cannot be assumed to be consistent across all locales.

### Charge Duration and Zero-Span Duration

12.0.5 states that the following charge duration APIs will return zero-span duration when the spell has reached its maximum charges:
zh-TW_to_en.4cb7e0dbb6f30b93d648f5838ed27df8:
And zero-span duration objects are considered fully elapsed.

EAM CooldownService rules:

- charge-based spell Don't just use old-style `charges == maxCharges` to judge timers.
- Requires support for zero-span `DurationObject`.
- `IconRenderState.timer.mode` can retain `displayOnly`, which is handed over by the renderer to the cooldown widget.
- If you need to judge "completed", you must confirm whether the duration object can be safely judged or the widget display result will be assumed.

### ignoreGCD parameter

12.0.5 Added `ignoreGCD` parameter of cooldown-duration-constructing APIs.

EAM rules:
zh-TW_to_en.78d3e0c427a6acabd0bed540a82d35a0:
- spell cooldown alert should ignore GCD class cooldown by default.
- If the API provides `ignoreGCD`, give priority to using official parameters instead of guessing based on 61304 differences.
- GCD dummy spell `61304` is still required as a test/conformance watchpoint, but should not be the only architecture.

### AuraData field is no longer secret

12.0.5 states that the following `AuraData` fields are no longer secret:
zh-TW_to_en.331e3a0a277554d6f964fadf4e317ca4:
EAM AuraService rules:

- These fields can be prioritized for sorting/filtering, but still need to be checked for target build behavior.
- `isFromPlayerOrPlayerPet` replaces part of the old `unitCaster == "player"` logic.
- It does not mean that the entire `AuraData` is safe; duration, expiration, spellID, name, and icon still need to be checked individually.

### Aura Instance ID re-random

12.0.5 states that aura instance IDs will be re-randomized when entering encounter, Mythic+, and PvP.

EAM AuraService rules:
zh-TW_to_en.d3013b7f165b5b0766abf9cf98a2c612:
- `auraInstanceID` can be used as a safe anchor within a single session/single limit range.
- Cannot be saved long-term across encounters / M+ / PvP.
- The aura cache should be cleared when entering a restricted scenario or receiving a target/world/combat status change.
- SavedVariables MUST NOT save `auraInstanceID`.

### Unit API and identity restrictions

12.0.5 Strengthen unit identity restriction:

- `UnitName` no longer accepts secret unit tokens.
- `UnitSpellTargetName` only returns player unit names.
- `UnitTokenFromGUID` does not return arena, nameplate, boss, party, raid, target-of-target token when using identity secret.
zh-TW_to_en.e537b0a6255e0cd011493b342d11fd8e:
- `UnitIsUnit` may return secret for `targettarget` / `focustarget`, and return nil when comparison is prohibited.

EAM rules:

- Do not use `targettarget` / `focustarget` as core alert matching.
- target aura alert only tracks `target`, do not automatically extend to target-of-target.
- debug export should not attempt to convert secret unit identity to name/GUID.
- UI label If unit name is unsafe, display blank or safe fallback.

### table.freeze / table.isfrozen

12.0.5 New:
zh-TW_to_en.f50b5e44ff08c38ac1f847016722c55a:
EAM rules:

- Enum, schema, module names, status constants available for `Core/Constants.lua`.
- Not available for SavedVariables.
- Not available for runtime aura/cooldown/icon state.
- Not available for scheduler queue or pool objects.
- Fallback is required because development environments or older builds may not have these APIs.

### Secret string formatting restrictions

12.0.5 pointed out that the string formatting API no longer applies field-width modifiers to secret strings, e.g. `"%.5s"` does not truncate secret strings.

EAM rules:

- Do not truncate secret-derived text by formatting.
zh-TW_to_en.e10f8abbb74dec689ab59a89f2e292ac:
- `C_TooltipInfo` still needs to check whether text is secret before parsing.
- debug export Do not hard-export the secret string through `format`.
- Length control of timer/name text should be done on safe string.

### Player Stat is associated with Aura Secret

12.0.5 pointed out that APIs that return player stats may also return secrets when using auras secrets.

EAM rules:

- special power/resource UI cannot assume player stats are always safe.
- `SpecialPower` rewrite should follow the same boundary policy.
- If power/resource is unsafe, render icon-only or hand it over to Blizzard-supported display.

### Font Smooth Scaling
zh-TW_to_en.ba8363b14a4bc7e7d444e7a3a7f453e4:
EAM Renderer can be used for timer/name/stack label visual quality after live Retail verification, but it should not be placed in the hot path for repeated settings.

### Cooldown Widget Secret Aspect

`Cooldown:SetCooldown` and `Cooldown:SetCooldownDuration` allow receiving specific secret arguments in the tainted path, but will add `Enum.SecretAspect.Cooldown`. `Cooldown:GetCooldownDisplayDuration` may return the secret according to the Cooldown secret aspect.

EAM Renderer rules:

- Safe numeric cooldown can be delegated to `SetCooldown(start, duration, modRate)`.
- If the source is `DurationObject`, use `SetCooldownFromDurationObject(duration, clearIfZero)` first.
zh-TW_to_en.f75e771056649213d53587fcdbb01452:
- Don't read back `GetCooldownDisplayDuration()` as fact in Renderer.
- Any Cooldown frame that may be marked by secret aspect is only used for display; do not send the getter return value back to the service state.

## 12.0.7 API change highlights

As of review on 2026-05-26, Warcraft Wiki has `Patch 12.0.7/API_changes`, marked TOC is `120007`, and the difference interval is `12.0.5 (67602) -> PTR 12.0.7 (67669)`.

Items directly related to EAM or need to be tracked:

- Added `C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding`.
- Added `C_DurationUtil.CreateManualClock`.
zh-TW_to_en.1fd6f9dc42aaf703c6484f4d747d5f31:
- Removed `C_DurationUtil.GetCurrentTime`.
- Added profiling / CPU usage class API: `GetEventCPUUsage`, `GetFunctionCPUUsage`, `GetScriptCPUUsage`.
- Most other new projects are biased toward Delves, Housing, Merchant, PartyInfo, UIFileAsset and other systems, and are not currently EAM core dependencies.

EAM file rules:

- `EventAlertMod.toc` is currently anchored to `120007`; CurseForge game version ID and WoW Retail/PTR actual loading status still need to be confirmed before release.
- The DurationObject / timer display layer needs to evaluate whether `CreateDurationTextBinding` and `CreateManualClock` can replace the handwritten reciprocal string.
zh-TW_to_en.682dc2d8bee08d7320b4350903130223:
- Don't use removed `C_DurationUtil.GetCurrentTime`.
- The new CPU usage API can only be used as a debug/profiling on-demand tool and cannot be placed in the hot path.
- 12.0.7 still requires live Retail/PTR actual testing, and you cannot rely solely on documents to claim full compatibility.

## 12.0 AddOn Security core changes

12.0.0 introduces AddOn security changes, with the goal of restricting AddOn from using combat information to make complex decisions, but still allowing UI appearance adjustments.

The core concept is `Secret Values`:

- secret value is a black box value.
zh-TW_to_en.40cf883aa6c46d3a4ae987a109ae4a5d:
- The tainted addon code can receive secrets and can also pass secrets to some allowed APIs.
- The tainted addon code cannot read the secret internal value.
- General Lua arithmetic, comparison, string conversion, `tonumber`, `string.match`, table key and other operations cannot be performed on the secret.
- If the API document indicates that a secret will be returned, EAM must treat this data as unsafe and cannot mix it with facts.

## Secret related API
zh-TW_to_en.a5491ff1e7254da3462319477ae1669f:
12.0.0 adds multiple secret checking/processing APIs. EAM rewrite should be centrally packaged in `Core/Env.lua` or `Core/Util.lua`, and do not let each service make direct calls.

Important global APIs:
zh-TW_to_en.3675007fb067c78d3036e4dced651933:
Implementation rules:

- Check the readability of the table itself before reading it.
- After reading the value, check whether the value is secret.
- Only confirmed safe values ​​can be entered into `facts`.
- unsafe values ​​can only form `boundaryWarnings` or `timer.mode = "protected" / "unknown" / "displayOnly"`.
- Do not write secret values ​​to SavedVariables.

### Secret Values ​​single page supplement
zh-TW_to_en.c0bf4b943bd4cf3af750ae50e9f2d8a0:
The Warcraft Wiki `Secret_Values` describes Secrets as a new mechanism introduced in Patch 12.0.0; tainted addon code can usually only save secrets or pass them to allowed APIs, but cannot inspect the contents.

EAM judgment rules:

- `if value then` can only be used to distinguish whether it is nil; it cannot mean that value is comparable, formattable or serializable.
- Don't throw secret strings into `string.match`, `string.format` or tooltip parser.
- Secret numbers cannot be used for timer operations, sorting, differences, and table keys.
zh-TW_to_en.a32c73cc29d2cd9759fbd59538a1d765:
- If `ConditionalSecret` or `SecretWhen...` appears on the API single page, boundary handling must be retained even if the test environment temporarily returns a normal value.

## Secret Aspects and UI Objects

Secret not only affects Lua values, but also pollutes the aspect of the script object.

Important risks:

- Pass the secret into some widget APIs, and it is possible to have the relevant getter of the widget return the secret later.
- Secret anchors may propagate down the anchor chain.
- Layout frame should not receive secret-fed data directly.
zh-TW_to_en.782dce051b084926f63902fe25af2d00:
- Renderer should isolate the frame that "undertakes the secret display object" and "is responsible for the layout anchor".

EAM UI implementation suggestions:

- `IconPool` creates a stable frame structure.
- `Renderer` only accepts normalized `IconRenderState`.
- Any possible secret texture, alpha, shown, text, and duration display must be limited to the smallest UI node.
- If the frame needs to be reused, you should study and test whether `SetToDefaults` can safely clear the secret aspect.

## Aura API Change Highlights

12.x has secret restrictions on aura access. Planning notes state:
zh-TW_to_en.9c07da8ce746a9b8a7e965a9e95187a8:
- aura access will become secret in restricted state.
- The vector container of `GetUnitAuras` / `UNIT_AURA` may not be a secret, but the content value may be a secret.
- `AuraInstanceID` is not a secret.
- Directly query the API of a single aura based on spellID/name, which may not be called when aura access secret is used.

EAM `AuraService` implementation rules:

- Prefer `UNIT_AURA` incremental information.
- Use `auraInstanceID` as security identification anchor.
- Don't assume spellID lookup will be available in combat.
- Write only if `AuraState.factsSafe = true` is readable.
zh-TW_to_en.9876c77f8e17bae9553257ebed172df2:
- Keep safe icon/name when unreadable, set timer to `protected` or `unknown`.
- After exiting `PLAYER_REGEN_ENABLED`, perform a safe rescan to remove residual images and boundary-limited state.

Related APIs:
zh-TW_to_en.45daf52184dbfbc841e81fa8be4accb2:
### C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDataByAuraInstanceID

The `auraInstanceID` parameter of `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDataByAuraInstanceID(unit, auraInstanceID)` is marked as `NeverSecret`, but the returned `UnitAuraInfo` may be `SecretWhenUnitAuraRestricted`.

EAM implementation rules:

- `auraInstanceID` can be used as a runtime anchor, but cannot be saved to SavedVariables.
- Four core security check defenses:
  - `canaccesstable(table)`: A security check must be made before accessing any returned table fields.
  - `canaccessvalue(value)`: Perform access permission determination before reading the field content.
zh-TW_to_en.6eaa769687f10f5d299548af841721aa:
- `issecretvalue(value)`: Used to confirm whether a field (such as `spellId` or `duration`) has been encrypted as a secret value.
  - `issecrettable(table)` / `hasanysecretvalues(table)`: Check whether the table structure itself has been restricted or contains secrets.
- **Table Index Protection Specification (Critical)**:
  - It is strictly prohibited to directly perform `tbl[spellId]` lookup on any custom Lua table (such as `EAM.SavedVariables`, `EAM.db`) with a key that may be a secret value (such as `spellId` in restricted state).
zh-TW_to_en.913e7bf6ba54f9fbc03c13a7f51f1755:
- This operation will throw a fatal error: `attempted to index a table that cannot be indexed with secret keys`.
  - Before looking up the table, a preventive check must be performed in the local in-place mode of `if not issecretvalue(key) and canaccesstable(tbl) then ... end` to refuse to use the secret key.
- Only fields that can be safely read are entered into `facts`; the rest are only entered into `boundaryWarnings`.
- Aura matching cannot rely solely on unsafe `spellID`; if necessary, use settings, events, safe anchors and display degradation to handle it together.

## Cooldown API Change Highlights
zh-TW_to_en.9ac129f580256fa30d9c05fd8005d217:
12.0 removes or deprecates many old global spell APIs. EAM should no longer retain the Classic/legacy unpacked return layer.

The old global API should use `C_Spell` instead:
zh-TW_to_en.0f48da45cfe6ebda0f705c888a0b3979: `SpellCooldownInfo` has new fields in 12.x, for example:
zh-TW_to_en.c56948b61afb3a320d0cae0b61441d08:
The Warcraft Wiki page states that `C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown` is an API added in Patch 11.0.0 to replace the old `GetSpellCooldown`; it may return nil, and may return secret when spell cooldown restricted. The `isOnGCD` field is `NeverSecret`, but the document reminds you not to trust this field unless responding to `SPELL_UPDATE_COOLDOWN`.

EAM `CooldownService` implementation rules:

- Prefer structured `C_Spell` return.
- No longer relies on the old `start, duration, enabled = GetSpellCooldown(id)` unpack.
- Use `C_Secrets.ShouldSpellCooldownBeSecret(spellID)` or secrecy API to determine.
zh-TW_to_en.146d0d84f9c4a847275e24fc9cecf8ee:
- When cooldown is unsafe, do not guess the start/duration by yourself.
- GCD judgment should use safe fields, such as `isOnGCD`, and verify with live Retail.
- `isOnGCD` is only a candidate for trustworthy judgment in the `SPELL_UPDATE_COOLDOWN` event context.
- `C_Spell.GetSpellCharges` may also be affected by the cooldown restriction; the charge field cannot be directly evaluated without checking.
- The old `GetSpellCooldown` page has been clearly marked to be removed/replaced starting from 11.0.0, and the new architecture must not use it as a core fallback.

## DurationObject and C_CurveUtil systems
zh-TW_to_en.0ea2d69eca7fd546b5e64ae0369c8e98:
12.0.0 added `DurationObject`, 12.0.1 added `DurationObject:GetClockTime`, and 12.0.7 enhanced native text and curve binding.

### 🔑 DurationObject core built-in methods and security traps
- **`durationObj:IsZero()`**:
  - *Purpose*: Check if the duration has reached 0 (expired).
zh-TW_to_en.af1c283ef5464adb8f797595a4f79b32:
- *Fatal Trap*: In combat or Restricted state, this method returns **`SecretBoolean`**. If `if durationObj:IsZero() then` is executed directly in Lua, it will immediately cause a fatal crash: `attempt to perform boolean test on a secret value`!
  - *Security Defense*: You must use `issecretvalue(val)` or `pcall` for preventive protection, or leave it entirely to the C++ native `clearIfZero` parameter (e.g. set in `SetCooldownFromDurationObject`).
- **`durationObj:GetRemainingDuration()`**:
zh-TW_to_en.05e8ff3013bc2f4380a4265879ea9f21:
- *Use*: Get the remaining seconds.
  - *Restriction*: In the Restricted state, an encrypted **`SecretValue`** will be returned. Directly performing Lua arithmetic operations on it (such as `+ - * / < > ==`) will directly trigger a fatal red letter error.
- **`durationObj:GetClockTime()`**:
  - *Purpose*: Used for underlying native clock synchronization to eliminate Taint caused by drift and UI jitter. But in combat this is also a `SecretValue`.
zh-TW_to_en.e3c184bdaf533a807c4cd1ba41fce329:
### 🎨 C_CurveUtil (curve visualization tool) combat anti-Taint mechanism
In order to solve the problem that it is impossible to directly compare the time with `if remaining < 5 then` to change the icon color or flash during the battle (because it will trigger the `SecretValue` comparison crash), Blizzard introduced **`C_CurveUtil`**:
zh-TW_to_en.1170be5345289495f373bc7d247a8d4b:
* **Mechanism**: AddOn can use `C_CurveUtil.CreateCurve()` to establish a non-linear color or transparency curve mapping, such as defining "turn red when the remaining time is less than 20% (Pandemic judgment)".
* **Binding**: Bind this curve to the Status/Progress Bar or Cooldown control together with `DurationObject` (for example `statusBar:SetColorCurve(curve, durationObject)`).
zh-TW_to_en.8a97f879894d68982e1216a54a981c3d:
* **Advantages**: All mathematical comparisons and color conversions occur in the C++ native layer, **100% avoiding Lua calls to stacked Taints, and completely eliminating per-frame OnUpdate garbage collection pressure**!

### 📝 12.0.7 Native FontString and Cooldown display binding
* **`C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding(durationObject, fontString)`**:
zh-TW_to_en.b4592127a5acc3551e6526d12a37e3ee:
- In 12.0.7, you can directly bind `DurationObject` natively to FontString. The countdown text is directly rendered and updated in C++, eliminating the burden of Lua spelling strings every frame.
    - When clearing, you must use `timerBinding:Unbind()` and call `fontString:ClearText()` on FontString (introduced in 12.0.1 to remove the Text secret aspect to prevent Secret Anchor pollution).
* **`Cooldown:SetCooldownFromDurationObject(durationObject [, clearIfZero])`**:
zh-TW_to_en.5768a4b5408e46c34f3af23ddcc91a48:
- Native binding specifically for Cooldown masks. When zero-span is used, setting `clearIfZero = true` will automatically clear the Swipe mask by the native engine.

Warcraft Wiki `ScriptObject DurationObject` explains that DurationObject is used to allow the native end to calculate the time data that may be secreted, and then pass the result back to Lua. It can be created by `C_DurationUtil.CreateDuration()`, can also be returned by aura, cast, spellbook cooldown duration and other APIs, and can be passed to `Cooldown:SetCooldownFromDurationObject()` or `StatusBar:SetTimerDuration()`.
zh-TW_to_en.5069ce69f1533a9243fcca2c9a6dfd15: The planning direction for 12.x is to remove the remaining time API and use duration object instead:
zh-TW_to_en.4ae88badc14e3ac7e888cb00a429c15d:
The above APIs should avoid becoming new architecture dependencies.

Important widget APIs:
zh-TW_to_en.db32ebba01b3419c65c296f1b64c655a:
EAM `Renderer` implementation rules:

- If there is a safe `DurationObject`, give priority to `Cooldown:SetCooldownFromDurationObject()`.
- Don't calculate remaining seconds per frame in Lua hot path itself.
- timer text Don't display fake seconds if it cannot be obtained safely.
- `IconRenderState.timer.mode` should be clearly marked: `numeric`, `displayOnly`, `protected`, `unknown`.
- Do not serialize `DurationObject`, do not write SavedVariables, and do not put debug facts.
zh-TW_to_en.04f2ebf6ca1bfb9ee4aea5426d17b6c2:
- To display duration, Renderer is only responsible for passing the object to the supported widget; the service state only marks the source and mode.

## FontString and Text Secret Aspect

12.0.1 New:
zh-TW_to_en.f183a63c044cf1cc763764797472444d:
Its purpose is to set the text to an empty string and remove the Text secret aspect.

EAM Renderer recommends:

- When clearing FontString that may have been exposed to secret text, give priority to testing `ClearText()`.
- If `ClearText()` is available, use it when clearing timer/name/stack label.
- Do not use secret-derived string to do `SetText` and then read it back.
- `SetText` must do value gating to avoid repeated UI writing and GC.

## Tooltip / C_TooltipInfo Duration Parsing

`C_TooltipInfo` can be used as a low-frequency fallback, but cannot be a hot path.
zh-TW_to_en.0a6091f6155a411514785a5c4c0e42ac:
In 12.x / Midnight, the specializations **`C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitBuffByAuraInstanceID(unitToken, auraInstanceID [, filter])`** and **`GetUnitDebuffByAuraInstanceID(unitToken, auraInstanceID [, filter])`** should be used. These two APIs perfectly bridge the `AuraInstanceID` of `NeverSecret`, achieve data-driven decoupling of data and UI, provide extremely low GC overhead and are far safer than the old `SetUnitBuff` simulated rendering.

### 🚨 Key avoidance points 1: Calling `TooltipUtil.SurfaceArgs` is strictly prohibited
zh-TW_to_en.cb7144c0ca9c0150515d4a7ceee883e7:
After Patch 10.1.0, the data of `C_TooltipInfo` has been automatically "Surfaced" by the bottom layer when returning to Lua. This SharedXML library helper function has been completely removed (nil) by Blizzard.
* Any call to `TooltipUtil.SurfaceArgs` will directly trigger an `attempt to call field 'SurfaceArgs' (a nil value)` causing AddOn to crash.
* 12.x developers should access `TooltipDataLine.leftText` directly.

### 🚨 Key pitfall 2: Direct access to `line.leftText` property reading and custom function parameter passing double crash
> [!WARNING]
zh-TW_to_en.97076489100fe2234cea7a60cd646575:
> **Young man’s top practical discovery (super critical)**:
> 1. If you try to wrap a restricted/with Secret Aspect Table into a custom Lua function (such as `GetSafeLeftText(line)`) for processing, **in the step of "passing the Table as a parameter to the custom Lua function", the sandbox security defense will directly throw a parameter violation error and crash! **
zh-TW_to_en.48d3eb150d503f6cd1589ef8a202cc8f:
> 2. This is because restricted Secret/Protected objects are prohibited from being passed to untrusted custom Lua functions.
>
> Therefore, the path of "Including customized FUNCTION parameters" is absolutely not feasible in combat! **

#### 🛡️ 100% absolutely feasible and safe "local Inline pcall anonymous closure" defense solution:
zh-TW_to_en.98243e6720150612fc3870f429622278: In order to safely read the Table properties without calling a custom function to pass parameters, we must use the system's built-in **`pcall`** with underlying C++ execution immunity and error capture rights to perform local inline anonymous closure reading** in the same Local scope (Scope):
zh-TW_to_en.6644e6fc66fc773e776bd5fef90e5333:
EAM `AuraService` and other analysis modules will strictly follow this local Inline pcall anonymous closure mode when accessing any potentially restricted C_TooltipInfo return value, eliminating any naked table lookup and custom function parameter passing.

`C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitAuraByAuraInstanceID` was added in 12.0.0, the predicate contains `MayReturnNothing` and `SecretWhenInCombat`, and `SecretArguments` only allows untainted use. Its filters added `CROWD_CONTROL`, `RAID_IN_COMBAT`, `RAID_PLAYER_DISPELLABLE`, `BIG_DEFENSIVE`, `IMPORTANT` in 12.0.1.

Consider analyzing:
zh-TW_to_en.88857e19575e775e78c1b43c53b8992b:
- Static "lasts for X seconds" description.
- Static "recovery time" description.
- Static maximum cooldown description.

Must avoid:

- Dynamic countdown text.
- Contains the text "yet".
- Text containing `Remaining`.
- Any line text that is not checked by `issecretvalue(text)`.

Reason:

- Dynamic literals generated from secret values in 12.x may themselves be secret userdata.
- Doing `string.match` on secret text may be a direct error.
zh-TW_to_en.566375abe223413356feff2506a46f82:
- Tooltip parsing will incur string and table parsing costs and cannot be placed in `OnUpdate`.

EAM implementation rules:

- Tooltip parsing can only be executed when an event is triggered, cache miss, setting change, or low-frequency idle fallback.
- Not executable in `Renderer`.
- Cannot be executed in per-icon timer.
- Check text security before parsing.
- If the tooltip API returns secret or nil in combat, it will be downgraded directly without retrying the hot loop.
zh-TW_to_en.51004b4d6e1b40acb8e000b6ff60a0f8:
- The new filter can only be used as a prompt to narrow down the tooltip source, and cannot be used as a safety guarantee.
- Blacklist keywords take precedence over pattern matches.
- If the parsed result is not a native API fact, it should be marked as `derived` or `fallback` and cannot be passed off as native facts.

## Item Cooldown and Item-Spell Mapping

The focus of changes in Warcraft Wiki 12.x does not support EAM to continue large-scale itemID scanning.

EAM `ItemCooldownService` rules:

- Direct itemID cooldown monitoring takes precedence.
- item-spell mapping cache can only be opt-in.
zh-TW_to_en.381c6641add9ebc760533af9724a9cf3:
- cache building must be idle-only, non-combat, FPS-aware, and interruptible.
- Large item range cannot be scanned in combat.
- The cache builder cannot be placed on the login hot path.

## Events and Structure

12.x is not suitable for EAM to continue to rely on combat log blind scanning.

Suggested events:
zh-TW_to_en.a45d9b80619a5068672ef8ec6d7f3da5:
Implementation rules:

- Use a single `EventRouter` frame.
- The event frame can be used to form an orphan frame using `CreateFrame("Frame", nil, nil)` to reduce the risk of UI taint.
- Do not use `RegisterAllEvents`.
- Do not establish closure within event handler.
- The event only marks the dirty state, and the actual UI writing is handed over to the Renderer batch.

## SavedVariables Rules

The 12.x plan/documentation states that secrets should not go into SavedVariables; secret serialization may be replaced with nil.

EAM rules:

- SavedVariables only saves user config.
- aura runtime state is not saved.
zh-TW_to_en.5589266b07c3ffbf428a1c59614ffa2f:
- Cooldown runtime state is not saved.
- `DurationObject` does not exist.
- No secret value is saved.
- Unsafe raw value in debug snapshot is not saved.

## Debug Export rules

Debug export must be layered:
zh-TW_to_en.63dcf310f0e488dab4b1def359ca3e39:
Rules:

- Only safe facts can enter `facts`.
- Tooltip parsing results into `derived` or marking `fallback`.
- secret/protected/unavailable status goes into `boundaryWarnings`.
- Do not output huge logs.
- No automatic export.
- Do not convert secret value to string.

## Live Retail 12.x must-test items

None of the following can be assumed solely based on documentation:

- Actual names and behavior of `issecretvalue`, `canaccesstable`, `canaccessvalue`.
- Whether the `C_Secrets.Should*` series all exist in the target build.
- `C_Secrets.GetSpellAuraSecrecy`, `GetSpellCooldownSecrecy` returns enum content.
zh-TW_to_en.13fb58da7b44ba1cddbd5e3c49689167:
- Behavior of the `DurationObject` returned by `C_UnitAuras.GetAuraDuration`.
- Whether `Cooldown:SetCooldownFromDurationObject()` can accept secret-safe duration.
- Whether `FontString:ClearText()` can safely clear the Text secret aspect.
- Whether `Cooldown:SetCountdownFormatter()` and `SecondsFormatter` can safely receive secret duration.
- `Cooldown:SetCountdownMillisecondsThreshold()` The actual effect of decimal display in zhTW/enUS locale.
- `C_Spell.GetSpellChargeDuration()` Whether to return zero-span duration at max charges.
- Whether the fully elapsed behavior of zero-span `DurationObject` complies with the EAM cooling completion determination.
zh-TW_to_en.ab7cf2ff8757e4f9703f8e77f67561a9:
- Actual name, default value and list of applicable APIs for the `ignoreGCD` parameter of the cooldown-duration APIs.
- Whether `AuraData.isHelpful`, `isHarmful`, `isRaid`, `isNameplateOnly`, `isFromPlayerOrPlayerPet` are stable in restricted state non-secret.
- Whether `auraInstanceID` is re-randomized at the start of encounter/M+/PvP as documented.
- Whether `table.freeze` and `table.isfrozen` exist in the target client, and whether misuse of SavedVariables/runtime state will cause errors.
- `SPELL_UPDATE_COOLDOWN` with spellID or to narrow the update range.
zh-TW_to_en.cf11a659bf60ff80544e45b99e02f683:
- Is `SpellCooldownInfo.isOnGCD` reliable.
- `C_TooltipInfo.GetUnitAuraByAuraInstanceID` restriction on secret aura.
- Is dynamic tooltip line possible secret userdata.
- Name and availability of secret restriction forced CVars.
- The actual impact of 12.0.7's `C_DurationUtil.CreateDurationTextBinding`, `CreateManualClock` and removal of `GetCurrentTime` on the EAM timer display layer.

## Conclusion on EAM Rewrite

EAM 12.x architecture should use:

- Retail-only.
- event-driven first.
-single scheduler.
- no timer-per-icon.
- no timer-per-spell.
- no large item scan by default.
- facts/derived/boundaryWarnings separation.
zh-TW_to_en.475a264d3aca02afc364f54627a038aa:
- DurationObject takes precedence over Lua seconds calculations.
- Tooltip parsing is only for low frequency fallback.
- Renderer does not check API.
- SavedVariables never save runtime/secret state.
zh-TW_to_en.4454ea72c4578ecbf46299e23846e85e:
# Warcraft Wiki Main Menu Three-level traversal notes

This file complements the tree traversal of the `Main Menu` on the left side of the `API_change_summaries` page.

The goal is not to copy the entire site content, but to build the navigation index required by EAM Retail rewrite:

- First level: `Main Menu` entrance.
- Second level: the main classification or index direction of the entry page.
- Third layer: representative API/documentation page.
- Level 4: Implementation conclusion with EAM rewrite.

## Source entry

- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/WoW_API
- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Lua_functions

- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/FrameXML_functions

- https://warcraft.wiki.gg/wiki/Hyperlinks
